summary: The ExEx backfill stream divergence is a semicolon-only rustfmt change to an early Poll::Ready return; no stream scheduling or job buffering behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 113: M	crates/exex/exex/src/backfill/stream.rs.
The isolated patch only changes `return Poll::Ready(Some(job_result))` to `return Poll::Ready(Some(job_result));`.
No polling branch, job requeueing, stream state, or notification behavior changed.
